free_text: Neutron emission in interactions of H-1, H-2, He-4,
and C-12 nuclei with lead nuclei at 1 to 2 GeV per
Data for proton interactions with lead are given.
The same data for proton and deuteron interactions
with lead are given. Detectors description was taken.
The detector based on a stilbene crystal 10 mm
in thickness and 40 mm in diameter was used for
The energy region above 2.5 MeV was studied with the
detectors based on stilbene crystals 50 mm in thickness
The neutron detectors with plastic scintillators (200
mm in thickness and 120 mm in diameter) were used for
Digitizing error of outgoing particle energy
consisted of uncertainty in measurement of a number of
target nuclei, a number of beam particles fell on
a target and contribution of background effects.
No response from authors was received.
